title: How artificial intelligence is shaping the Swiss job market
description: AI experience is fast becoming an essential skill for hiring companies.
content:
The spread of artificial intelligence (AI) in the workplace is threatening to create a two-tiered job market. AI experience is fast becoming an essential skill for hiring companies.

title: What every dealmaker should know about the limits of general-purpose AI tools
description: As artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates across mergers and acquisitions (M&A), many firms are mistaking connectivity for intelligence.
content:
Connecting AI to deal documents is only the first step. The real advantage comes from building intelligence across the deal life cycle.

title: UAE eyes deeper technology, connectivity partnership with Andhra Pradesh to boost investment
description: The United Arab Emirates aims to strengthen ties with Andhra Pradesh. Technology collaboration, especially in artificial intelligence, is a key focus area. Improved air connectivity will facilitate business and tourism between the two regions. Several UAE companies are exploring investment opportunities in food processing sectors. Andhra Pradesh's role in UAE food security is also being discussed.

title: Global Market: South Korea's Kospi jumps 6% as AI chipmakers lead broad market rebound
description: South Korean stocks surged on Wednesday, with the KOSPI jumping over 6% as semiconductor heavyweights led a broad-based rally. Renewed optimism around artificial intelligence stocks, strong foreign buying and gains in automakers and battery makers lifted sentiment, while investors awaited earnings from major global technology companies.

title: EAM S Jaishankar, Marco Rubio hold talks in Manila on trade, energy
description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar met US Secretary of State Marco Rubio in Manila. They discussed trade, tariffs, energy, defence, critical minerals, and artificial intelligence. Both diplomats attended high-level discussions under the ASEAN and Quad frameworks. They also exchanged views on the West Asia crisis and its global energy impact. These discussions focused on priority areas for the India-US Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership.
